# High-performance sequence processing

{{< epigraph "*All we have to decide is what to do with the cycles that are given us.*" source="not J. R. R. Tolkien" >}}

<!--
```{dot}
//| fig-width: 6
//| fig-height: 0.6
digraph {
  rankdir=LR
  graph [margin=0.1 pad=0]
  node [shape=box style=rounded]
  "Parsing" -> "Hashing" -> "Minimizers" -> "Downstream application"
  "Parsing" [URL="simd-parsing.html"]
  "Hashing" [URL="rolling-hash.html"]
  "Minimizers" [URL="simd-minimizers.html"]
  "Downstream application" [URL="filtering.html"]
}
```
-->
